name: Cardio Starter
description: Low-impact cardio you can do at home.

entries.name: Living-Room Cardio
entries.summary: A gentle, joint-friendly circuit to raise the heart rate. Repeat twice.

steps.title: March in Place
steps.instruction: Lift the knees and pump the arms at a steady pace.

steps.title: Step Touch
steps.instruction: Step side to side, tapping the floor; keep it light.

steps.title: Standing Knee Lifts
steps.instruction: Alternate lifting each knee toward the opposite elbow.
